events.title: Onanya Icaros
events.description: A live-looping sound ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple. Onanya Nicho — a decade-long apprentice in Amazonian plant medicine traditions, initiated as an Onanya (Shipibo: 'one who knows the plants') by Maestra Estela Pangoza and her family at Aya Madre Healing Center — weaves icaros, the ancient healing songs of the jungle, into a layered sonic landscape built live in the moment. Voice, multi-instrument looping, and the ceremonial presence of sacred song. Each performance is unrepeatable: the soundscape shapes itself to the energy in the space.
events.short_description: Healing icaros and live-looping sound ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple, led by Amazonian plant medicine initiate Onanya Nicho.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 300,000 early bird / IDR 350,000 presale / IDR 400,000 at door

events.title: Confidence and Grace: 2-Day Contact Improvisation Intensive
events.description: Euphoria Movement's follow-on to their June beginner series: a two-day CI intensive in Ubud for dancers ready to deepen their contact improvisation practice. Focus on sensitivity, responsive listening, shared weight, and momentum — the qualities that make sustained CI partnering genuinely spacious. Small-group, immersive format.
events.short_description: Intermediate contact improvisation intensive in Ubud from Euphoria Movement — follow-on to the June beginner workshop.
